heading: Registration of research facilities, handlers, carriers and unlicensed exhibitors
label: 2136 Registration of research facilities, handlers, carriers and unlicensed exhibitors
text: Every research facility, every intermediate handler, every carrier, and every exhibitor not licensed under shall register with the Secretary in accordance with such rules and regulations as he may prescribe.section 2133 of this title
notes: Amendments1976— inserted “, every intermediate handler, every carrier,” after “research facility”.Pub. L. 94–2791970— inserted reference to exhibitors not licensed under .Pub. L. 91–579section 2133 of this title
Effective Date of 1970 AmendmentAmendment by effective one year after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–579section 23 of Pub. L. 91–579section 2131 of this titleDec. 24, 1970
